title: FLUX 3 x mimic: The Next Generation of Video-Action Models
excerpt: FLUX 3 is running robots. Built with mimic and deployed at Audi, FLUX-mimic shows content creation and physical AI share one foundation: a model that understands the world.
content_html:
An early version of FLUX 3, our new multimodal foundation model, is now running on robots. We gave mimic robotics early access to FLUX.3. Their strength in robot learning and deployment, combined with the model's world knowledge and BFL's foundation model expertise, produced FLUX-mimic: the next generation of video-action models.

FLUX

FLUX 1 and FLUX 2 generate images. FLUX 3 expands into multimodality and generates audio-visual content jointly - and, at the same time, provides the foundation of FLUX-mimic: A video-action model, developed in collaboration with mimic, running robots that have been tested and deployed at Audi.

At first glance, producing convincing visual content and controlling robots seem to have little in common. One requires generating pixels, the other an understanding of how the physical world responds when you touch and manipulate it. If one model does both, it was never really only a content creation model. It is a model of how the world behaves, and content creation is one thing one can do with it.

That is what FLUX 3 is.

Video is the hard part

FLUX 3 is one model, jointly trained across images, video and audio from the beginning. The most demanding part of that training - accounting for over 95% of the total compute costs - is video prediction. To generate realistic videos, a model has no choice but to learn contact, motion, weight, cause and effect; get any of them wrong and it looks wrong. Learning to render the world accurately means learning how the world behaves.

Relatively speaking, audio is the easy modality. Low dimensional and far less detailed than video, it makes up less than 0.5% of the tokens in a 720p video with audio. Once a model has done the hard work of learning video understanding, it will learn the causal relationship between video and audio to predict speech synchronized to lip movement and audio effects synchronized to the physical events causing them.

Actions follow the same shape: a low dimensional representation of a robot's state, tightly coupled to visual observations. Actions, audio and video frames are all partial representations of a single underlying physical reality. After the model has learned about the physical processes behind video and audio, action prediction is not a new departure - it is one more view of the reality it already models.

A single backbone

If that framing is correct, teaching FLUX 3 to predict actions should not incur lasting costs: we expect a brief phase of disturbance as the model has to learn the structure of the action space and align its internal representation of the world to it, before returning to full performance. That is exactly what we observe.

In a large-scale training run, we added action prediction to the curriculum and observed the effect on video generation quality. Human ratings on text-to-video and image-to-video initially fell by up to 10% as the model started to incorporate the new action modality. After 3500 steps, the model had regained its full previous quality on video generation tasks while now also predicting actions.

Each series is normalized to its own quality before action prediction was added. Higher is better.

The model had to integrate actions into its inputs and outputs - but doing so didn't cost it capacity permanently. It merely had to learn how this new modality relates to its existing model of the world. Once this was figured out, the performance penalty on its existing capabilities was gone. Video generation and action prediction don't need separate foundations. The same backbone carries both.

This makes Physical AI a natural extension of our roadmap at Black Forest Labs rather than a change in direction. Content creation is what our multimodal FLUX 3 backbone does with image, video and audio. Physical AI is what it does with actions. One foundation model, with visual intelligence at its core, enabling two families of applications. We didn't build a separate foundation model. We focused on the hard thing: building a model that understands the world. Acting in it is what that understanding makes possible.

From lab to reality: FLUX-mimic

What happens when we point the FLUX 3 backbone at real automation tasks on real production lines?

That's the question mimic and BFL created FLUX-mimic to answer. mimic builds their own robots and brings expertise in robot learning, dexterous manipulation and production deployment; BFL builds visual foundation models and brings multimodal training and modeling expertise. Together, we built a next-generation model for general-purpose manipulation - adapted to industry requirements and integrated into mimic's full-stack deployment system. FLUX-mimic is a video-action model built on the FLUX 3 backbone.

Decoding the learned world model

Our thesis is that FLUX 3 has to learn an internal representation of the world to be able to generate videos. FLUX-mimic follows through on this thesis and decodes actions from the learned world representation of the FLUX backbone. This approach, pioneered in mimic-video, trains a lightweight action decoder on top of intermediate features extracted from the video prediction path of FLUX.

Architecture overview how FLUX-mimic is built on top of FLUX 3

The success of this approach depends on two related but different aspects: the quality of the world model learned by FLUX and the quality of the feature representation of this world model. The quality of the world model is directly related to the generation quality: if a model does not understand how the world behaves, it cannot simulate it. However, even the best world model does not help an action decoder if it is inaccessible: if the feature space keeps the causal relationships between modalities entangled nonlinearly, understanding those relationships from the feature representation remains as difficult as understanding them from the raw inputs - representation quality matters.

Generation quality and representation quality have long been studied and approached in isolation from each other. Generative approaches result in high-quality world models that enable simulations and they exhibit scaling laws for predictable returns on compute investments. However, compared to more specialized approaches for representation learning they produce less disentangled representations, which puts a ceiling on their usefulness for tasks that require world understanding.

As generative models themselves rely on their own features, this divergence in their representation quality seems counter-intuitive. Improved representations within generative models should improve the quality of their world model and make them more usable for downstream tasks. In our work, Self-Flow, we demonstrated how to unify generation and representation learning in a single framework and observed exactly this reciprocal improvement: the world model improved - as measured by generation quality across video, image and audio - and its representation quality improved - as measured by success rate for robot control tasks in simulation.

Self-Flow vs. Flow Matching (FM). Left: generation error (Fréchet distance) per modality, each normalized to FM = 100 (lower is better). Right: success rate on manipulation tasks averaged over four task groups through finetuning (higher is better).

Scaling the world model

Scaling laws remain true with Self-Flow, and FLUX 3 is the application of that: the scaled-up version of Self-Flow. It is trained on tens of millions of hours of general video content to learn world dynamics as broadly as possible from day one, and on hundreds of thousands of hours of video content focused on human and robot manipulation tasks to be ready as a backbone for visual intelligence. This scaling is what translates the success of Self-Flow from the lab to reality. mimic deployed FLUX-mimic in real factory use cases spanning the daily reality of production and logistics work: kitting parts into structured trays, inserting electronic control units into tight-fitting fixtures, assembling components together, and handling soft, flexible materials like seals and cables that conventional automation has never been able to touch.

Benchmarks demonstrate that the action decoder outperforms previous vision-language-action models, even with a completely frozen FLUX backbone - a setting where previous vision-language-action models fail to succeed. This highlights how scaling gives our backbone strong knowledge of the world and how to act in it, and how Self-Flow makes this knowledge readily decodable from the backbone's feature representations. When finetuning the backbone together with the action decoder, FLUX-mimic achieves state-of-the-art success rates.

Dashed line marks each model's median success rate across 20 autonomous trials. Higher is better.

From world knowledge to a working task

A backbone exposing world knowledge in decodable representations changes what it takes to teach a robot a new task. If the physics is already in the representation and readily accessible, adapting to a task is no longer a matter of teaching the model how the world works - it only has to learn how this particular task maps onto what it already knows. The expensive part is done before the robot ever moves.

This shows up directly in how much demonstration data a new task requires. In our Self-Flow experiments, action prediction reached a given success rate in half the training steps compared to a video model without Self-Flow - better representations make the world knowledge easier to extract, so less data is needed to reach the same capability. The mimic-video paper reports up to 10x sample efficiency for video-action models over vision-language-action models; FLUX-mimic combines both effects.

The same benefit shows up in behavior. FLUX-mimic naturally recovers from failure: a robot that misses a grasp corrects itself, grasps again, and completes the task. No demonstration set can cover every possible way a task can go wrong. Recovery that was never demonstrated has to come from somewhere else - from a model that already knows how the world behaves.

The backbone's predicted future (top), alongside the rollout the robot produced from the decoded actions (bottom).

Fast enough to act

Real-world deployment sets a hard constraint: the model has to act as fast as the world moves. The dominant compute cost for FLUX-mimic sits in the backbone. It is the largest component of the model and, in mimic's optimized deployment stack, its latency effectively sets the ceiling for the whole system.

This is where our methodology pays off a second time. Better representations mean more capability per parameter: a model that has learned a well-structured world model needs less capacity to reach a given level of performance than one that has not. For deployment, this translates directly into being able to run a smaller backbone - and a smaller backbone is a faster backbone.

CLIP score at 1.0M training steps; higher is better. Backbone depth is the dominant driver of deployment latency, so fewer layers means a faster model.

As a result, the backbone of FLUX-mimic can be optimized to run from input to world representation in less than 80ms on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU - which puts it on the same order of magnitude as human visual reaction time.

Real-world deployments require additional optimizations of the full deployment stack to avoid adding any additional latency: mimic's optimizations range from the action decoder, through cutting inter-process latency between sensors, the model and actuators, to real-time chunking such that prediction and execution overlap and keep the robots running smoothly without jitter. The end result is a self-contained robot system with reaction times of 101ms.

On the factory floor

All of this leads back to the place where automation matters: the factory. Audi runs one of the most automated production networks in the automotive industry - which gives it a precise view of where conventional automation still stops. Despite decades of robotics investment, tasks with flexible parts and fine manipulation have stayed manual, largely for economic reasons: the variant diversity of premium production makes conventionally programmed robot cells too costly to re-engineer for each case. Learning-based systems change that math.

"In partnership with mimic, Audi has been testing and deploying FLUX-mimic. We have seen these robots solve complex soft-body manipulation work that would have been simply impossible with conventional robotics. This can have a major impact in assisting our employees, increasing efficiency, and expanding flexible automation across production and logistics operations. For us, partnering with pioneering companies such as mimic and Black Forest Labs is essential in pushing the frontier of physical AI and validating these innovations in real-world production environments." — Christoph Schneider, Audi Production Lab

Closing

FLUX-mimic is a purpose-built robotics model - and a proof point for what's to come. Its sample efficiency and robustness come from the FLUX 3 backbone and the quality of the representations it exposes, not from task-specific engineering. That is what lets the approach transfer across tasks, industries, and hardware. Read more through mimic.

One model, with visual intelligence at its core, generating image, video and audio - and driving robots on a production line. Content creation and physical AI are two applications of the same foundation.

blocks.html_en: In a large-scale training run, we added action prediction to the curriculum and observed the effect on video generation quality. Human ratings on text-to-video and image-to-video initially fell by up to 10% as the model started to incorporate the new action modality. After 3500 steps, the model had regained its full previous quality on video generation tasks while now also predicting actions.

sentences.en: In a large-scale training run, we added action prediction to the curriculum and observed the effect on video generation quality.
sentences.zh: 在大规模训练中，我们在课程中添加了动作预测，并观察了它对视频生成质量的影响。

sentences.en: Human ratings on text-to-video and image-to-video initially fell by up to 10% as the model started to incorporate the new action modality.
sentences.zh: 随着模型开始采用新的动作模式，人类对文本到视频和图像到视频的评分最初下降了 10%。

sentences.en: After 3500 steps, the model had regained its full previous quality on video generation tasks while now also predicting actions.
sentences.zh: 经过 3500 步后，该模型在视频生成任务上完全恢复了之前的质量，同时还可以预测动作。

blocks.html_en: Each series is normalized to its own quality before action prediction was added. Higher is better.

sentences.en: Each series is normalized to its own quality before action prediction was added.
sentences.zh: 在添加动作预测之前，每个系列都根据自己的质量进行标准化。

sentences.en: Higher is better.
sentences.zh: 越高越好。

blocks.html_en: The model had to integrate actions into its inputs and outputs - but doing so didn't cost it capacity permanently. It merely had to learn how this new modality relates to its existing model of the world. Once this was figured out, the performance penalty on its existing capabilities was gone. Video generation and action prediction don't need separate foundations. The same backbone carries both.

sentences.en: The model had to integrate actions into its inputs and outputs - but doing so didn't cost it capacity permanently.
sentences.zh: 该模型必须将操作集成到其输入和输出中 - 但这样做不会永久消耗其容量。

sentences.en: It merely had to learn how this new modality relates to its existing model of the world.
sentences.zh: 它只需要了解这种新模式如何与其现有的世界模式相关。

sentences.en: Once this was figured out, the performance penalty on its existing capabilities was gone.
sentences.zh: 一旦弄清楚这一点，其现有功能的性能损失就消失了。

sentences.en: Video generation and action prediction don't need separate foundations.
sentences.zh: 视频生成和动作预测不需要单独的基础。

sentences.en: The same backbone carries both.
sentences.zh: 同一主干承载着这两者。

blocks.html_en: This makes Physical AI a natural extension of our roadmap at Black Forest Labs rather than a change in direction. Content creation is what our multimodal FLUX 3 backbone does with image, video and audio. Physical AI is what it does with actions. One foundation model, with visual intelligence at its core, enabling two families of applications. We didn't build a separate foundation model. We focused on the hard thing: building a model that understands the world. Acting in it is what that understanding makes possible.

sentences.en: This makes Physical AI a natural extension of our roadmap at Black Forest Labs rather than a change in direction.
sentences.zh: 这使得物理人工智能成为黑森林实验室路线图的自然延伸，而不是方向的改变。

sentences.en: Content creation is what our multimodal FLUX 3 backbone does with image, video and audio.
sentences.zh: 内容创建是我们的多模式 FLUX 3 主干对图像、视频和音频的作用。

sentences.en: Physical AI is what it does with actions.
sentences.zh: 物理人工智能是通过动作来实现的。

sentences.en: One foundation model, with visual intelligence at its core, enabling two families of applications.
sentences.zh: 一种基础模型，以视觉智能为核心，支持两个系列的应用程序。

sentences.en: We didn't build a separate foundation model.
sentences.zh: 我们没有建立单独的基础模型。

sentences.en: We focused on the hard thing: building a model that understands the world.
sentences.zh: 我们专注于困难的事情：建立一个理解世界的模型。

sentences.en: Acting in it is what that understanding makes possible.
sentences.zh: 理解使行动成为可能。

blocks.html_en: From lab to reality: FLUX-mimic

sentences.en: From lab to reality: FLUX-mimic
sentences.zh: 从实验室到现实：模拟通量

blocks.html_en: What happens when we point the FLUX 3 backbone at real automation tasks on real production lines?

sentences.en: What happens when we point the FLUX 3 backbone at real automation tasks on real production lines?
sentences.zh: 当我们将 FLUX 3 主干网指向实际生产线上的实际自动化任务时会发生什么？

blocks.html_en: That's the question mimic and BFL created FLUX-mimic to answer. mimic builds their own robots and brings expertise in robot learning, dexterous manipulation and production deployment; BFL builds visual foundation models and brings multimodal training and modeling expertise. Together, we built a next-generation model for general-purpose manipulation - adapted to industry requirements and integrated into mimic's full-stack deployment system. FLUX-mimic is a video-action model built on the FLUX 3 backbone.

sentences.en: That's the question mimic and BFL created FLUX-mimic to answer.
sentences.zh: 这就是模拟的问题，BFL 创建了 FLUX-mimic 来回答。

sentences.en: mimic builds their own robots and brings expertise in robot learning, dexterous manipulation and production deployment; BFL builds visual foundation models and brings multimodal training and modeling expertise.
sentences.zh: imit 打造自己的机器人，并带来机器人学习、灵巧操作和生产部署方面的专业知识； BFL 构建视觉基础模型并带来多模式培训和建模专业知识。

sentences.en: Together, we built a next-generation model for general-purpose manipulation - adapted to industry requirements and integrated into mimic's full-stack deployment system.
sentences.zh: 我们共同构建了用于通用操作的下一代模型 - 适应行业需求并集成到imit的全栈部署系统中。

sentences.en: FLUX-mimic is a video-action model built on the FLUX 3 backbone.
sentences.zh: FLUX-mimic 是一种基于 FLUX 3 主干的视频动作模型。

blocks.html_en: Decoding the learned world model

sentences.en: Decoding the learned world model
sentences.zh: 解码学习的世界模型

blocks.html_en: Our thesis is that FLUX 3 has to learn an internal representation of the world to be able to generate videos. FLUX-mimic follows through on this thesis and decodes actions from the learned world representation of the FLUX backbone. This approach, pioneered in mimic-video, trains a lightweight action decoder on top of intermediate features extracted from the video prediction path of FLUX.

sentences.en: Our thesis is that FLUX 3 has to learn an internal representation of the world to be able to generate videos.
sentences.zh: 我们的论点是 FLUX 3 必须学习世界的内部表示才能生成视频。

sentences.en: FLUX-mimic follows through on this thesis and decodes actions from the learned world representation of the FLUX backbone.
sentences.zh: FLUX-mimic 继承了这篇论文，并从 FLUX 主干的学习世界表示中解码了动作。

sentences.en: This approach, pioneered in mimic-video, trains a lightweight action decoder on top of intermediate features extracted from the video prediction path of FLUX.
sentences.zh: 这种方法在模拟视频中首创，在从 FLUX 视频预测路径中提取的中间特征之上训练轻量级动作解码器。

blocks.html_en: Architecture overview how FLUX-mimic is built on top of FLUX 3

sentences.en: Architecture overview how FLUX-mimic is built on top of FLUX 3
sentences.zh: 架构概述 FLUX-mimic 如何构建在 FLUX 3 之上

blocks.html_en: The success of this approach depends on two related but different aspects: the quality of the world model learned by FLUX and the quality of the feature representation of this world model. The quality of the world model is directly related to the generation quality: if a model does not understand how the world behaves, it cannot simulate it. However, even the best world model does not help an action decoder if it is inaccessible: if the feature space keeps the causal relationships between modalities entangled nonlinearly, understanding those relationships from the feature representation remains as difficult as understanding them from the raw inputs - representation quality matters.

sentences.en: The success of this approach depends on two related but different aspects: the quality of the world model learned by FLUX and the quality of the feature representation of this world model.
sentences.zh: 这种方法的成功取决于两个相关但不同的方面：FLUX 学习的世界模型的质量和该世界模型的特征表示的质量。

sentences.en: The quality of the world model is directly related to the generation quality: if a model does not understand how the world behaves, it cannot simulate it.
sentences.zh: 世界模型的质量与生成质量直接相关：如果模型不了解世界的行为方式，则无法模拟它。

sentences.en: However, even the best world model does not help an action decoder if it is inaccessible: if the feature space keeps the causal relationships between modalities entangled nonlinearly, understanding those relationships from the feature representation remains as difficult as understanding them from the raw inputs - representation quality matters.
sentences.zh: 然而，如果无法访问，即使是最好的世界模型也无法帮助动作解码器：如果特征空间使模态之间的因果关系保持非线性纠缠，那么从特征表示中理解这些关系仍然与从原始输入中理解它们一样困难 - 表示质量很重要。

blocks.html_en: Generation quality and representation quality have long been studied and approached in isolation from each other. Generative approaches result in high-quality world models that enable simulations and they exhibit scaling laws for predictable returns on compute investments. However, compared to more specialized approaches for representation learning they produce less disentangled representations, which puts a ceiling on their usefulness for tasks that require world understanding.

sentences.en: Generation quality and representation quality have long been studied and approached in isolation from each other.
sentences.zh: 生成质量和表征质量长期以来一直被相互孤立地研究和探讨。

sentences.en: Generative approaches result in high-quality world models that enable simulations and they exhibit scaling laws for predictable returns on compute investments.
sentences.zh: 生成方法产生高质量的世界模型，可以进行模拟，并且它们表现出可预测的计算投资回报的缩放法则。

sentences.en: However, compared to more specialized approaches for representation learning they produce less disentangled representations, which puts a ceiling on their usefulness for tasks that require world understanding.
sentences.zh: 然而，与更专业的表示学习方法相比，它们产生的解缠结表示较少，这限制了它们在需要理解世界的任务中的有用性。

blocks.html_en: As generative models themselves rely on their own features, this divergence in their representation quality seems counter-intuitive. Improved representations within generative models should improve the quality of their world model and make them more usable for downstream tasks. In our work, Self-Flow, we demonstrated how to unify generation and representation learning in a single framework and observed exactly this reciprocal improvement: the world model improved - as measured by generation quality across video, image and audio - and its representation quality improved - as measured by success rate for robot control tasks in simulation.

sentences.en: As generative models themselves rely on their own features, this divergence in their representation quality seems counter-intuitive.
sentences.zh: 由于生成模型本身依赖于自己的特征，因此其表示质量的这种差异似乎是违反直觉的。

sentences.en: Improved representations within generative models should improve the quality of their world model and make them more usable for downstream tasks.
sentences.zh: 生成模型中改进的表示应该提高其世界模型的质量，并使它们更适用于下游任务。

sentences.en: In our work, Self-Flow, we demonstrated how to unify generation and representation learning in a single framework and observed exactly this reciprocal improvement: the world model improved - as measured by generation quality across video, image and audio - and its representation quality improved - as measured by success rate for robot control tasks in simulation.
sentences.zh: 在我们的工作 Self-Flow 中，我们演示了如何将生成和表示学习统一在一个框架中，并准确地观察到了这种相互改进：世界模型得到了改进（通过视频、图像和音频的生成质量来衡量），而其表示质量也得到了改善（通过模拟中机器人控制任务的成功率来衡量）。

blocks.html_en: Self-Flow vs. Flow Matching (FM). Left: generation error (Fréchet distance) per modality, each normalized to FM = 100 (lower is better). Right: success rate on manipulation tasks averaged over four task groups through finetuning (higher is better).

sentences.en: Self-Flow vs. Flow Matching (FM).
sentences.zh: 自流与流量匹配 (FM)。

sentences.en: Left: generation error (Fréchet distance) per modality, each normalized to FM = 100 (lower is better).
sentences.zh: 左：每种模态的生成误差（Fréchet 距离），每个都标准化为 FM = 100（越低越好）。

sentences.en: Right: success rate on manipulation tasks averaged over four task groups through finetuning (higher is better).
sentences.zh: 右图：通过微调，四个任务组的平均操作任务成功率（越高越好）。

blocks.html_en: Scaling the world model

sentences.en: Scaling the world model
sentences.zh: 缩放世界模型

blocks.html_en: Scaling laws remain true with Self-Flow, and FLUX 3 is the application of that: the scaled-up version of Self-Flow. It is trained on tens of millions of hours of general video content to learn world dynamics as broadly as possible from day one, and on hundreds of thousands of hours of video content focused on human and robot manipulation tasks to be ready as a backbone for visual intelligence. This scaling is what translates the success of Self-Flow from the lab to reality. mimic deployed FLUX-mimic in real factory use cases spanning the daily reality of production and logistics work: kitting parts into structured trays, inserting electronic control units into tight-fitting fixtures, assembling components together, and handling soft, flexible materials like seals and cables that conventional automation has never been able to touch.

sentences.en: Scaling laws remain true with Self-Flow, and FLUX 3 is the application of that: the scaled-up version of Self-Flow.
sentences.zh: 缩放定律在 Self-Flow 中仍然适用，FLUX 3 就是该定律的应用：Self-Flow 的放大版本。

sentences.en: It is trained on tens of millions of hours of general video content to learn world dynamics as broadly as possible from day one, and on hundreds of thousands of hours of video content focused on human and robot manipulation tasks to be ready as a backbone for visual intelligence.
sentences.zh: 它接受了数千万小时的一般视频内容的训练，以便从第一天起就尽可能广泛地了解世界动态，并接受数十万小时的专注于人类和机器人操作任务的视频内容的训练，以准备成为视觉智能的支柱。

sentences.en: This scaling is what translates the success of Self-Flow from the lab to reality.
sentences.zh: 这种扩展将自流的成功从实验室转化为现实。

sentences.en: mimic deployed FLUX-mimic in real factory use cases spanning the daily reality of production and logistics work: kitting parts into structured trays, inserting electronic control units into tight-fitting fixtures, assembling components together, and handling soft, flexible materials like seals and cables that conventional automation has never been able to touch.
sentences.zh: mimic 在涵盖生产和物流工作日常现实的真实工厂用例中部署了 FLUX-mimic：将零件装配到结构化托盘中，将电子控制单元插入紧密配合的固定装置中，将组件组装在一起，以及处理传统自动化无法触及的柔软、灵活的材料，例如密封件和电缆。

blocks.html_en: Benchmarks demonstrate that the action decoder outperforms previous vision-language-action models, even with a completely frozen FLUX backbone - a setting where previous vision-language-action models fail to succeed. This highlights how scaling gives our backbone strong knowledge of the world and how to act in it, and how Self-Flow makes this knowledge readily decodable from the backbone's feature representations. When finetuning the backbone together with the action decoder, FLUX-mimic achieves state-of-the-art success rates.

sentences.en: Benchmarks demonstrate that the action decoder outperforms previous vision-language-action models, even with a completely frozen FLUX backbone - a setting where previous vision-language-action models fail to succeed.
sentences.zh: 基准测试表明，动作解码器的性能优于之前的视觉-语言-动作模型，即使在完全冻结的 FLUX 主干网的情况下也是如此——这是之前的视觉-语言-动作模型无法成功的设置。

sentences.en: This highlights how scaling gives our backbone strong knowledge of the world and how to act in it, and how Self-Flow makes this knowledge readily decodable from the backbone's feature representations.
sentences.zh: 这凸显了扩展如何为我们的骨干网提供关于世界以及如何在其中行动的强大知识，以及自流如何使这些知识可以轻松地从骨干网的特征表示中解码。

sentences.en: When finetuning the backbone together with the action decoder, FLUX-mimic achieves state-of-the-art success rates.
sentences.zh: 当与动作解码器一起微调主干网时，FLUX-mimic 实现了最先进的成功率。

blocks.html_en: Dashed line marks each model's median success rate across 20 autonomous trials. Higher is better.

sentences.en: Dashed line marks each model's median success rate across 20 autonomous trials.
sentences.zh: 虚线标记了每个模型在 20 次自主试验中的成功率中位数。

sentences.en: Higher is better.
sentences.zh: 越高越好。

blocks.html_en: From world knowledge to a working task

sentences.en: From world knowledge to a working task
sentences.zh: 从世界知识到工作任务

blocks.html_en: A backbone exposing world knowledge in decodable representations changes what it takes to teach a robot a new task. If the physics is already in the representation and readily accessible, adapting to a task is no longer a matter of teaching the model how the world works - it only has to learn how this particular task maps onto what it already knows. The expensive part is done before the robot ever moves.

sentences.en: A backbone exposing world knowledge in decodable representations changes what it takes to teach a robot a new task.
sentences.zh: 以可解码表示方式展示世界知识的主干网改变了教授机器人新任务所需的内容。

sentences.en: If the physics is already in the representation and readily accessible, adapting to a task is no longer a matter of teaching the model how the world works - it only has to learn how this particular task maps onto what it already knows.
sentences.zh: 如果物理学已经在表征中并且易于访问，那么适应任务就不再是教授模型世界如何运作的问题——它只需要学习这个特定的任务如何映射到它已经知道的东西上。

sentences.en: The expensive part is done before the robot ever moves.
sentences.zh: 昂贵的部分是在机器人移动之前完成的。

blocks.html_en: This shows up directly in how much demonstration data a new task requires. In our Self-Flow experiments, action prediction reached a given success rate in half the training steps compared to a video model without Self-Flow - better representations make the world knowledge easier to extract, so less data is needed to reach the same capability. The mimic-video paper reports up to 10x sample efficiency for video-action models over vision-language-action models; FLUX-mimic combines both effects.

sentences.en: This shows up directly in how much demonstration data a new task requires.
sentences.zh: 这直接体现在新任务需要多少演示数据。

sentences.en: In our Self-Flow experiments, action prediction reached a given success rate in half the training steps compared to a video model without Self-Flow - better representations make the world knowledge easier to extract, so less data is needed to reach the same capability.
sentences.zh: 在我们的自流实验中，与没有自流的视频模型相比，动作预测只需一半的训练步骤即可达到给定的成功率 - 更好的表示使世界知识更容易提取，因此达到相同能力所需的数据更少。

sentences.en: The mimic-video paper reports up to 10x sample efficiency for video-action models over vision-language-action models; FLUX-mimic combines both effects.
sentences.zh: 模拟视频论文报告称，视频动作模型的样本效率比视觉语言动作模型高出 10 倍； FLUX-mimic 结合了这两种效果。

blocks.html_en: The same benefit shows up in behavior. FLUX-mimic naturally recovers from failure: a robot that misses a grasp corrects itself, grasps again, and completes the task. No demonstration set can cover every possible way a task can go wrong. Recovery that was never demonstrated has to come from somewhere else - from a model that already knows how the world behaves.

sentences.en: The same benefit shows up in behavior.
sentences.zh: 同样的好处也体现在行为上。

sentences.en: FLUX-mimic naturally recovers from failure: a robot that misses a grasp corrects itself, grasps again, and completes the task.
sentences.zh: FLUX-mimic 会自然地从失败中恢复：错过抓取的机器人会自我纠正，再次抓取并完成任务。

sentences.en: No demonstration set can cover every possible way a task can go wrong.
sentences.zh: 没有任何演示集可以涵盖任务可能出错的所有可能方式。

sentences.en: Recovery that was never demonstrated has to come from somewhere else - from a model that already knows how the world behaves.
sentences.zh: 从未被证明的复苏必须来自其他地方——来自一个已经知道世界行为方式的模型。

blocks.html_en: The backbone's predicted future (top), alongside the rollout the robot produced from the decoded actions (bottom).

sentences.en: The backbone's predicted future (top), alongside the rollout the robot produced from the decoded actions (bottom).
sentences.zh: 骨干网预测的未来（上），以及机器人根据解码的动作产生的展示（下）。

blocks.html_en: Fast enough to act

sentences.en: Fast enough to act
sentences.zh: 行动足够快

blocks.html_en: Real-world deployment sets a hard constraint: the model has to act as fast as the world moves. The dominant compute cost for FLUX-mimic sits in the backbone. It is the largest component of the model and, in mimic's optimized deployment stack, its latency effectively sets the ceiling for the whole system.

sentences.en: Real-world deployment sets a hard constraint: the model has to act as fast as the world moves.
sentences.zh: 现实世界的部署设置了一个严格的约束：模型必须与世界的变化一样快。

sentences.en: The dominant compute cost for FLUX-mimic sits in the backbone.
sentences.zh: FLUX-mimic 的主要计算成本位于主干网。

sentences.en: It is the largest component of the model and, in mimic's optimized deployment stack, its latency effectively sets the ceiling for the whole system.
sentences.zh: 它是模型中最大的组件，在imit的优化部署堆栈中，它的延迟有效地设定了整个系统的上限。

blocks.html_en: This is where our methodology pays off a second time. Better representations mean more capability per parameter: a model that has learned a well-structured world model needs less capacity to reach a given level of performance than one that has not. For deployment, this translates directly into being able to run a smaller backbone - and a smaller backbone is a faster backbone.

sentences.en: This is where our methodology pays off a second time.
sentences.zh: 这是我们的方法第二次获得回报的地方。

sentences.en: Better representations mean more capability per parameter: a model that has learned a well-structured world model needs less capacity to reach a given level of performance than one that has not.
sentences.zh: 更好的表示意味着每个参数有更多的能力：一个已经学习了结构良好的世界模型的模型比没有学习过的模型需要更少的能力来达到给定的性能水平。

sentences.en: For deployment, this translates directly into being able to run a smaller backbone - and a smaller backbone is a faster backbone.
sentences.zh: 对于部署而言，这直接意味着能够运行较小的主干网 - 并且较小的主干网是更快的主干网。

blocks.html_en: CLIP score at 1.0M training steps; higher is better. Backbone depth is the dominant driver of deployment latency, so fewer layers means a faster model.

sentences.en: CLIP score at 1.0M training steps; higher is better.
sentences.zh: 1.0M 训练步骤时的 CLIP 得分；越高越好。

sentences.en: Backbone depth is the dominant driver of deployment latency, so fewer layers means a faster model.
sentences.zh: 主干深度是部署延迟的主要驱动因素，因此更少的层意味着更快的模型。

blocks.html_en: As a result, the backbone of FLUX-mimic can be optimized to run from input to world representation in less than 80ms on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU - which puts it on the same order of magnitude as human visual reaction time.

sentences.en: As a result, the backbone of FLUX-mimic can be optimized to run from input to world representation in less than 80ms on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU - which puts it on the same order of magnitude as human visual reaction time.
sentences.zh: 因此，FLUX-mimic 的主干可以优化为在单个 NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU 上从输入到世界表示的运行时间不到 80 毫秒，这使其与人类视觉反应时间处于同一数量级。

blocks.html_en: Real-world deployments require additional optimizations of the full deployment stack to avoid adding any additional latency: mimic's optimizations range from the action decoder, through cutting inter-process latency between sensors, the model and actuators, to real-time chunking such that prediction and execution overlap and keep the robots running smoothly without jitter. The end result is a self-contained robot system with reaction times of 101ms.

sentences.en: Real-world deployments require additional optimizations of the full deployment stack to avoid adding any additional latency: mimic's optimizations range from the action decoder, through cutting inter-process latency between sensors, the model and actuators, to real-time chunking such that prediction and execution overlap and keep the robots running smoothly without jitter.

sentences.en: One model, with visual intelligence at its core, generating image, video and audio - and driving robots on a production line.
sentences.zh: 一种模型以视觉智能为核心，生成图像、视频和音频，并在生产线上驱动机器人。

sentences.en: Content creation and physical AI are two applications of the same foundation.

content_html_zh:
我们新的多模式基础模型 FLUX 3 的早期版本现已在机器人上运行。 我们让模仿机器人尽早接触到 FLUX.3。 他们在机器人学习和部署方面的优势，结合模型的世界知识和 BFL 的基础模型专业知识，产生了 FLUX-mimic：下一代视频动作模型。

FLUX

FLUX 1 和 FLUX 2 生成图像。 FLUX 3 扩展到多模态并联合生成视听内容，同时为 FLUX-mimic 提供了基础：一种视频动作模型，与模仿运行的机器人合作开发，已在奥迪进行了测试和部署。

乍一看，制作令人信服的视觉内容和控制机器人似乎没有什么共同点。 一个需要生成像素，另一个需要了解当您触摸和操纵物理世界时它如何响应。 如果一个模型同时做到这两点，那么它就永远不仅仅是一个内容创建模型。 它是世界行为方式的模型，内容创作是人们可以用它做的一件事。

这就是 FLUX 3。

视频是最难的部分

FLUX 3 是一个模型，从一开始就跨图像、视频和音频进行联合训练。 该训练中要求最高的部分（占总计算成本的 95% 以上）是视频预测。 为了生成逼真的视频，模型别无选择，只能学习接触、运动、重量、因果关系；任何一个错了，看起来都是错的。 学习准确地渲染世界意味着了解世界的行为方式。

相对而言，音频是最简单的方式。 它的维度低且远不如视频详细，在 720p 音频视频中仅占不到 0.5% 的令牌。 一旦模型完成了学习视频理解的艰苦工作，它将学习视频和音频之间的因果关系，以预测与嘴唇运动同步的语音以及与引起它们的物理事件同步的音频效果。

动作遵循相同的形状：机器人状态的低维表示，与视觉观察紧密耦合。 动作、音频和视频帧都是单个底层物理现实的部分表示。 在模型了解了视频和音频背后的物理过程之后，动作预测并不是一个新的出发点——它是对其已经建模的现实的另一种看法。

单一主干

如果这个框架是正确的，教 FLUX 3 预测动作应该不会产生持久的成本：我们预计会出现短暂的干扰阶段，因为模型必须学习动作空间的结构，并将其对世界的内部表示与其对齐，然后才能恢复到完整的性能。 这正是我们所观察到的。

在大规模训练中，我们在课程中添加了动作预测，并观察了它对视频生成质量的影响。 随着模型开始采用新的动作模式，人类对文本到视频和图像到视频的评分最初下降了 10%。 经过 3500 步后，该模型在视频生成任务上完全恢复了之前的质量，同时还可以预测动作。

在添加动作预测之前，每个系列都根据自己的质量进行标准化。 越高越好。

该模型必须将操作集成到其输入和输出中 - 但这样做不会永久消耗其容量。 它只需要了解这种新模式如何与其现有的世界模式相关。 一旦弄清楚这一点，其现有功能的性能损失就消失了。 视频生成和动作预测不需要单独的基础。 同一主干承载着这两者。

这使得物理人工智能成为黑森林实验室路线图的自然延伸，而不是方向的改变。 内容创建是我们的多模式 FLUX 3 主干对图像、视频和音频的作用。 物理人工智能是通过动作来实现的。 一种基础模型，以视觉智能为核心，支持两个系列的应用程序。 我们没有建立单独的基础模型。 我们专注于困难的事情：建立一个理解世界的模型。 理解使行动成为可能。

从实验室到现实：模拟通量

当我们将 FLUX 3 主干网指向实际生产线上的实际自动化任务时会发生什么？

这就是模拟的问题，BFL 创建了 FLUX-mimic 来回答。 imit 打造自己的机器人，并带来机器人学习、灵巧操作和生产部署方面的专业知识； BFL 构建视觉基础模型并带来多模式培训和建模专业知识。 我们共同构建了用于通用操作的下一代模型 - 适应行业需求并集成到imit的全栈部署系统中。 FLUX-mimic 是一种基于 FLUX 3 主干的视频动作模型。

解码学习的世界模型

我们的论点是 FLUX 3 必须学习世界的内部表示才能生成视频。 FLUX-mimic 继承了这篇论文，并从 FLUX 主干的学习世界表示中解码了动作。 这种方法在模拟视频中首创，在从 FLUX 视频预测路径中提取的中间特征之上训练轻量级动作解码器。

架构概述 FLUX-mimic 如何构建在 FLUX 3 之上

这种方法的成功取决于两个相关但不同的方面：FLUX 学习的世界模型的质量和该世界模型的特征表示的质量。 世界模型的质量与生成质量直接相关：如果模型不了解世界的行为方式，则无法模拟它。 然而，如果无法访问，即使是最好的世界模型也无法帮助动作解码器：如果特征空间使模态之间的因果关系保持非线性纠缠，那么从特征表示中理解这些关系仍然与从原始输入中理解它们一样困难 - 表示质量很重要。

生成质量和表征质量长期以来一直被相互孤立地研究和探讨。 生成方法产生高质量的世界模型，可以进行模拟，并且它们表现出可预测的计算投资回报的缩放法则。 然而，与更专业的表示学习方法相比，它们产生的解缠结表示较少，这限制了它们在需要理解世界的任务中的有用性。

由于生成模型本身依赖于自己的特征，因此其表示质量的这种差异似乎是违反直觉的。 生成模型中改进的表示应该提高其世界模型的质量，并使它们更适用于下游任务。 在我们的工作 Self-Flow 中，我们演示了如何将生成和表示学习统一在一个框架中，并准确地观察到了这种相互改进：世界模型得到了改进（通过视频、图像和音频的生成质量来衡量），而其表示质量也得到了改善（通过模拟中机器人控制任务的成功率来衡量）。

自流与流量匹配 (FM)。 左：每种模态的生成误差（Fréchet 距离），每个都标准化为 FM = 100（越低越好）。 右图：通过微调，四个任务组的平均操作任务成功率（越高越好）。

缩放世界模型

缩放定律在 Self-Flow 中仍然适用，FLUX 3 就是该定律的应用：Self-Flow 的放大版本。 它接受了数千万小时的一般视频内容的训练，以便从第一天起就尽可能广泛地了解世界动态，并接受数十万小时的专注于人类和机器人操作任务的视频内容的训练，以准备成为视觉智能的支柱。 这种扩展将自流的成功从实验室转化为现实。 mimic 在涵盖生产和物流工作日常现实的真实工厂用例中部署了 FLUX-mimic：将零件装配到结构化托盘中，将电子控制单元插入紧密配合的固定装置中，将组件组装在一起，以及处理传统自动化无法触及的柔软、灵活的材料，例如密封件和电缆。

基准测试表明，动作解码器的性能优于之前的视觉-语言-动作模型，即使在完全冻结的 FLUX 主干网的情况下也是如此——这是之前的视觉-语言-动作模型无法成功的设置。 这凸显了扩展如何为我们的骨干网提供关于世界以及如何在其中行动的强大知识，以及自流如何使这些知识可以轻松地从骨干网的特征表示中解码。 当与动作解码器一起微调主干网时，FLUX-mimic 实现了最先进的成功率。

虚线标记了每个模型在 20 次自主试验中的成功率中位数。 越高越好。

从世界知识到工作任务

以可解码表示方式展示世界知识的主干网改变了教授机器人新任务所需的内容。 如果物理学已经在表征中并且易于访问，那么适应任务就不再是教授模型世界如何运作的问题——它只需要学习这个特定的任务如何映射到它已经知道的东西上。 昂贵的部分是在机器人移动之前完成的。

这直接体现在新任务需要多少演示数据。 在我们的自流实验中，与没有自流的视频模型相比，动作预测只需一半的训练步骤即可达到给定的成功率 - 更好的表示使世界知识更容易提取，因此达到相同能力所需的数据更少。 模拟视频论文报告称，视频动作模型的样本效率比视觉语言动作模型高出 10 倍； FLUX-mimic 结合了这两种效果。

同样的好处也体现在行为上。 FLUX-mimic 会自然地从失败中恢复：错过抓取的机器人会自我纠正，再次抓取并完成任务。 没有任何演示集可以涵盖任务可能出错的所有可能方式。 从未被证明的复苏必须来自其他地方——来自一个已经知道世界行为方式的模型。

骨干网预测的未来（上），以及机器人根据解码的动作产生的展示（下）。

行动足够快

现实世界的部署设置了一个严格的约束：模型必须与世界的变化一样快。 FLUX-mimic 的主要计算成本位于主干网。 它是模型中最大的组件，在imit的优化部署堆栈中，它的延迟有效地设定了整个系统的上限。

这是我们的方法第二次获得回报的地方。 更好的表示意味着每个参数有更多的能力：一个已经学习了结构良好的世界模型的模型比没有学习过的模型需要更少的能力来达到给定的性能水平。 对于部署而言，这直接意味着能够运行较小的主干网 - 并且较小的主干网是更快的主干网。

1.0M 训练步骤时的 CLIP 得分；越高越好。 主干深度是部署延迟的主要驱动因素，因此更少的层意味着更快的模型。

因此，FLUX-mimic 的主干可以优化为在单个 NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU 上从输入到世界表示的运行时间不到 80 毫秒，这使其与人类视觉反应时间处于同一数量级。

现实世界的部署需要对整个部署堆栈进行额外的优化，以避免增加任何额外的延迟：mimic 的优化范围从动作解码器到减少传感器、模型和执行器之间的进程间延迟，再到实时分块，以便预测和执行重叠并保持机器人平稳运行而不会出现抖动。 最终结果是反应时间为 101 毫秒的独立机器人系统。

在工厂车间

所有这些都回到了自动化至关重要的地方：工厂。 奥迪运营着汽车行业自动化程度最高的生产网络之一，这让奥迪能够准确地了解传统自动化仍然停滞不前的地方。 尽管进行了数十年的机器人技术投资，但涉及灵活零件和精细操作的任务仍然是手动的，这主要是出于经济原因：优质生产的多样性使得传统编程的机器人单元成本太高，无法针对每种情况进行重新设计。 基于学习的系统改变了数学。

“奥迪与 mimic 合作，一直在测试和部署 FLUX-mimic。 我们已经看到这些机器人解决了传统机器人技术根本不可能完成的复杂软体操纵工作。 这对于帮助我们的员工、提高效率以及扩大生产和物流运营的灵活自动化产生重大影响。 对我们来说，与imit和Black Forest Labs等先驱公司合作对于推动物理人工智能的前沿并在现实生产环境中验证这些创新至关重要。”——Christoph Schneider，奥迪生产实验室

闭幕式

FLUX-mimic 是一种专门构建的机器人模型 - 也是未来发展的证明。 它的样本效率和稳健性来自 FLUX 3 主干及其所公开的表示的质量，而不是来自特定于任务的工程。 这就是让该方法跨任务、行业和硬件转移的原因。 通过模仿阅读更多内容。

一种模型以视觉智能为核心，生成图像、视频和音频，并在生产线上驱动机器人。 内容创建和物理人工智能是同一基础的两种应用。
